title: Brazilian ICUMSA 45 Sugar — 12,500 MT Available
summary: FOB Santos, SGS inspection ready, shipment window July–August 2026.
content:
Origin: Brazil (Santos Port)
Quantity: 12,500 MT (flexible +/-10%)
Incoterms: FOB / CIF available
Inspection: SGS or CCIC, buyer's choice
Packing: 50kg PP bags or bulk
Shipment: July–August 2026
Payment: LC at sight preferred, negotiable

This is a verified supplier offer currently being intermediated by passnine. Contact us for the full specification sheet and current pricing.

title: BRF Chicken Paw — 24 Container Order, China Destination
summary: Grade A frozen chicken paw, BRF certified, CIF Qingdao.
content:
Supplier: BRF (Brasil Foods)
Product: Frozen Chicken Paw, Grade A
Quantity: 24 x 20FT containers (~480 MT)
Incoterms: CIF Qingdao
Destination: China
Veterinary certificates: Full compliance with China import requirements
Payment terms: To be negotiated, purchase agency option available

Buyer-side inquiry currently open. Sellers with matching capacity are encouraged to contact us.

title: VHP Sugar — Buyer Inquiry from Korea, 5,000 MT
summary: Korean buyer seeking VHP sugar for industrial refining, monthly contract possible.
content:
Buyer location: Korea
Product: VHP Sugar (Very High Polarization)
Quantity: 5,000 MT initial, monthly repeat possible
Incoterms: FOB or CIF Busan
Inspection: SGS required
Payment: LC, terms negotiable

This is an active buyer-side listing. Brazilian suppliers with available VHP stock are welcome to submit an offer through our inquiry form.
